name: Incident Postmortem Generator
description: Generates structured incident postmortem reports from Sentinel data and analyst Q&A, cross-referencing previous postmortems for recurring themes.

conversation_starters.text: Generate a postmortem for Sentinel incident INC-2026-0342
Are there recurring themes across our last 10 postmortems?
What action items from Q4 postmortems are still open?
